name: hyper-skills
description: Marketplace for the hyper-skills Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: hyper-skills-creator
plugins.description: Interactive skill matchmaker for coding agents: find an existing skill or plugin that fits the user's need, then adopt it as-is or customize it to their taste, level, and workflow. A hyper-skills-creator entry skill routes broad requests and composes finding-skills (search + narrow + adopt) and customizing-skills (tune + verify); bootstrapping-skills adds a self-triggered path that spots a skill gap mid-task and pulls one in.
